title: included menu
text: included menu A Uniface menu object that is included in another menu to provide a set of one or more menu items. A group (block) of logically related menu items. A menu can contain one or more included menus. Related Links menu A type of global object that enables users to see and execute application commands in a desktop application. A menu can be displayed as a menu bar, a drop-down menu (in a menu bar or cascaded menu), or a pop-up menu. menu item A menu option in a Uniface Menu object that performs an action, references another menu (such as a cascading menu), or is a separator for grouping items. Menu items have associated triggers in which to program the conditions under which they are displayed and the action they perform. pop-up menu A context-sensitive menu that is displayed when the user clicks on the object associated with the menu. The items in a pop-up menu depend on the type of object currently selected. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
